runs.text: Horchata is a sweet, creamy drink with roots in Spain and Latin America. Traditions vary by region — some use rice, others tiger nuts or seeds — but the result is always refreshing and festive.
1 cup uncooked Marsh Hen Mill Carolina Gold Rice Middlins
1/2 tsp ground cinnamon, plus more to garnish

blockMeta.name: Add a drizzle of Edisto Gold…

runs.text: Add a drizzle of Edisto Gold Honey for a rich, floral sweetness that pairs perfectly with cinnamon and rice.
Explore our favorite recipes — from quick weeknight rice bowls to festive drinks and Southern classics.
